mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sharp acceleration in payroll employment growth above 200k per month signals strong labor market dynamics that boost corporate earnings visibility, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 60% of instances where PAYEMS exceeds 200k monthly growth.

mechanism_narrative: A concurrent decline in both consumer price inflation (CPIAUCSL) and housing starts (HOUST) signals weakening demand conditions that trigger risk-off sentiment, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX records positive 60d returns in > 50% of periods where both CPIAUCSL and HOUST fall below thresholds.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in industrial production (INDPRO) above its 3-month moving average indicates expanding manufacturing capacity utilization, which correlates with positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns remain negative in 70%+ of instances where INDPRO exceeds 1.5% YoY growth.

mechanism_narrative: A tightening of monetary policy characterized by rising federal funds rates (FEDFUNDS) and declining money supply (RSAFS) creates headwinds for equity valuations, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are positive in > 50% of periods where both FEDFUNDS exceeds 4% and RSAFS declines by 5%+.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous rise in unemployment (UNRATE) and decline in consumer price inflation (CPIAUCSL) signals stagflationary risks that depress equity market performance, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns are positive in > 50% of instances where UNRATE exceeds 7.5% and CPIAUCSL falls below 2.5%.

mechanism_narrative: A rebound in consumer spending confidence (RSAFS) following a recessionary trough predicts stronger demand for equities, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns remain negative in 70%+ of periods where RSAFS shows a rebound from trough levels.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in industrial production (INDPRO) below its 12-month low signals manufacturing sector distress that correlates with negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are positive in > 50% of instances where INDPRO falls below 95.0.
